source_anchor: Tier 2 - algorithmic-art was 404 lines with verbose philosophy sections before being trimmed to 142
scenario: The historical algorithmic-art skill carried too much philosophy and not enough tight operational guidance, causing context bloat and slower execution.
expected_findings: Core instructions were buried under low-leverage context.
Progressive disclosure was weak because too much detail lived in the main skill body.
Negative triggers were not strong enough to separate it from adjacent design skills.
expected_patch_focus: Trim philosophy and preserve only operationally useful guidance.
Move detailed variants into references instead of the main body.
Strengthen negative triggers to avoid cross-skill overlap.

replay_plan.failed_slice: Replay a small art request where the operator needs fast tactical guidance, not philosophy.
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Replay a complex generative-art request where deeper references may still be useful.
replay_plan.canary: Replay a general UI design request that should route to another skill.
